current_level.name: Publish supply engine
current_level.mission: Maintain enough final-eligible Shorts that every publish window has a strong option.
current_level.unlock: Six operationally publish-ready Shorts, at least one dry-run eligible Short, and twenty pending stories.
current_level.revenue_job: Turn production from lucky shots into repeatable inventory.

boss.label: No candidate clears the final publish gate

top_blockers.operator_translation: collect more observed signal before scaling this pattern
rewrite the held candidate until queue prune clears
make the opening visual cue explicit

next_upgrade.title: Turn held strong candidates into final-eligible reserve
next_upgrade.why: The automation can publish safely, but the final gate has zero eligible candidates.

action_plan.action: Repair one held high-score story until dry-run eligible_count reaches one.
action_plan.why: No candidate clears the final publish gate

action_plan.action: Batch-fix the top blocker reasons before fetching a larger queue.
action_plan.why: Current supply has strong ideas but fails late gates.

action_plan.action: Build the reserve to six operational publish-ready Shorts.
action_plan.why: One upload slot should never depend on one fragile candidate.

action_plan.action: Refresh free discovery only after the current repair batch is clean.
action_plan.why: Bigger inventory helps only when the gate can accept winners.

top_blockers.operator_translation: collect more observed signal before scaling this pattern
rewrite the held candidate until queue prune clears
make the opening visual cue explicit
observe this pattern before scaling it
front-load the subject in the opening
pick a fresh subject inside the same lane

levels.name: Launch safety
levels.mission: Keep the publisher safe, recoverable, and able to upload without manual drama.
levels.unlock: At least one real upload is recorded and automation health is usable.
levels.revenue_job: Protect the channel asset before chasing volume.

levels.name: Publish supply engine
levels.mission: Maintain enough final-eligible Shorts that every publish window has a strong option.
levels.unlock: Six operationally publish-ready Shorts, at least one dry-run eligible Short, and twenty pending stories.
levels.revenue_job: Turn production from lucky shots into repeatable inventory.

levels.name: Retention packaging
levels.mission: Make the opening frame and first sentence clear enough that strangers keep watching.
levels.unlock: Stayed-to-watch rate at 40% or higher and average view percentage at 62% or higher.
levels.revenue_job: Convert reach into watch time and proof that the format works.

levels.name: Repeat audience loop
levels.mission: Turn one-off viewers into people who recognize the channel and come back.
levels.unlock: Recurring viewer rate reaches 2% and audience comments keep producing usable prompts.
levels.revenue_job: Build an audience identity instead of isolated viral posts.

levels.name: Free distribution mesh
levels.mission: Give every winner a free web, search, and cross-post path without paid tools.
levels.unlock: Search traffic reaches 5% and the free cross-post pack has at least three ready assets.
levels.revenue_job: Make each successful Short travel farther than the Shorts feed.

levels.name: Monetization runway
levels.mission: Prove sponsor-safe consistency, subscriber conversion, and a clean operating record.
levels.unlock: One thousand subscribers and at least 1.5 subscribers gained per thousand views.
levels.revenue_job: Prepare the channel for platform revenue, sponsorship, and product experiments.

levels.name: Compound scale
levels.mission: Run the machine with enough quality, cadence, and audience memory to compound.
levels.unlock: One million views per 28 days, excellent health, and ten publish-ready Shorts in reserve.
levels.revenue_job: Scale the proven system instead of adding random effort.

game_loop.now: Repair one held high-score story until dry-run eligible_count reaches one.

free_resource_policy.rule: Spend money only after a free signal proves the next bottleneck is worth scaling.

business_path.job: Publish safely and learn what strangers keep watching.
Turn winners into recognizable lanes, sequels, and comments.
Keep rights, metadata, and performance evidence clean enough for partners.
Test platform revenue, sponsorship, licensing, and product ideas only after repeat demand appears.
